_about: Pinned sources of truth for the UCP conformance tester. NEVER test against main/feature branches; pin by the SHAs below. Regenerate intentionally and review the diff. See docs/spec-coverage.md for methodology.

2026-04-08.note: Tag commit is dated 2026-05-22, NOT 2026-04-08 — release/2026-04-08 received post-date cherry-picks (attribution, identity-linking OAuth rework, selected_options->options, profile-schema fixes). 'What 04-08 contains' = this tagged artifact, not a clean date-cut.

official_conformance_suite.note: SIGNAL, NOT ORACLE. This suite is pinned to SPEC version 2026-01-23 (its protocol_test asserts version 2026-01-23 and asserts HTTP 400 for incompatible-version where the 2026-04-08 spec maps to 422). It provides NO oracle for any 2026-04-08-introduced requirement. No release tags exist; pinned to a main SHA which can drift.

schema_validator.note: Rust CLI (`cargo install ucp-schema`). Used as the schema-validation ORACLE. No release tags; pinned to main SHA. Does NOT cover prose-only invariants (totals sums, lookup dedup, line-item retention) — those are separate coded checks.

reference_sample_server.note: Flower Shop reference merchant (samples/rest/python/server) — the KNOWN-COMPLIANT target for self-validation. Serves spec version 2026-01-23 (confirmed: /.well-known/ucp ucp.version=2026-01-23). This is why 2026-01-23 is the oracle-backed primary; 2026-04-08 has no reference server and is validated via synthetic fixtures. A no-op test passes against this server, which is why every check also needs a negative fixture (mutation proxy). Run on port 8182; sim endpoints gated by --simulation_secret.

reference_sdk.note: Required by the Flower Shop server (editable dep at ../../../../python-sdk). Vendored at .vendor/python-sdk. IMPORTANT pin rationale: python-sdk main (298c2958) is 'upgrade SDK to UCP v2026-04-08' and is INCOMPATIBLE with the 2026-01-23 Flower Shop server (ImportError: Checkout from ap2_mandate). f54858e is the commit immediately BEFORE that upgrade (the last 2026-01-23-compatible SDK, 0.3.0). This is the version-drift hazard the methodology warns about: pin compatible trios (conformance/samples/python-sdk), not bare main.

toolchain.cargo: INSTALLED via rustup (used to build the ucp-schema oracle, Phase 0d)
toolchain.uv: INSTALLED 0.11.26 (runs the Flower Shop server + official suite, Phase 0e)
